Package global.thalion.ttio.genomics

Record Class WrittenGenomicRun

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
global.thalion.ttio.genomics.WrittenGenomicRun
Record Components:
acquisitionMode - Enums.AcquisitionMode.GENOMIC_WGS or Enums.AcquisitionMode.GENOMIC_WES.
referenceUri - e.g. "GRCh38.p14".
platform - e.g. "ILLUMINA".
sampleName - e.g. "NA12878".
positions - int64 per-read 0-based mapping positions.
mappingQualities - uint8 per-read mapping qualities.
flags - uint32 per-read SAM flags.
sequences - uint8 concatenated bases (one ASCII byte per base in M82; base-packing deferred to the codec milestone).
qualities - uint8 concatenated Phred quality scores.
offsets - uint64 per-read byte offset into sequences/qualities.
lengths - uint32 per-read length in bases.
cigars - one CIGAR string per read.
readNames - one read name per read.
mateChromosomes - one mate chromosome per read; "" if unpaired.
matePositions - int64 per-read mate position; -1 if unpaired.
templateLengths - int32 per-read template length; 0 if unpaired.
chromosomes - one chromosome per read (for the index).
signalCompression - codec applied to typed signal channels. Defaults to Enums.Compression.ZLIB; pass Enums.Compression.NONE to skip.
signalCodecOverrides - M86: per-channel TTI-O codec opt-in. Maps channel name (only "sequences" and "qualities" accepted) to a codec id (only Enums.Compression.RANS_ORDER0, Enums.Compression.RANS_ORDER1, or Enums.Compression.BASE_PACK accepted). Channels not in this map use the signalCompression HDF5-filter dispatch path. Defaults to empty; never null.
provenanceRecords - Phase 1 (post-M91): per-run provenance chain in insertion order. Defaults to empty; never null. Round-trips through the <run>/provenance_json attribute on the genomic run group, mirroring AcquisitionRun's layout.
embedReference - M93 (v1.5): when true (default), the writer embeds referenceChromSeqs at /study/references/<reference_uri>/. Set to false when the reference is supplied externally and the file should not duplicate the bytes. Has no effect when referenceChromSeqs is null.
referenceChromSeqs - M93 (v1.5): per-chromosome reference sequence bytes (uppercase ACGTN), keyed by chromosome name. Required input for the REF_DIFF context-aware codec on the sequences channel; absent values cause REF_DIFF to fall back to BASE_PACK silently (Q5b=C). May be null.
externalReferencePath - M93 (v1.5): optional explicit external FASTA path that REF_DIFF readers can fall back to when the reference is not embedded and REF_PATH is unset. May be null; not yet honoured by Java writers (kept for symmetry with Python / ObjC).
public record WrittenGenomicRun(Enums.AcquisitionMode acquisitionMode, String referenceUri, String platform, String sampleName, long[] positions, byte[] mappingQualities, int[] flags, byte[] sequences, byte[] qualities, long[] offsets, int[] lengths, List<String> cigars, List<String> readNames, List<String> mateChromosomes, long[] matePositions, int[] templateLengths, List<String> chromosomes, Enums.Compression signalCompression, Map<String,Enums.Compression> signalCodecOverrides, List<ProvenanceRecord> provenanceRecords, boolean embedReference, Map<String,byte[]> referenceChromSeqs, Path externalReferencePath) extends Record
Write-side container for a single genomic run, passed to SpectralDataset.writeMinimal.

Genomic analogue of global.thalion.ttio.WrittenRun. Pure data — no methods beyond accessors and the canonical record components.

Cross-language equivalents: Objective-C TTIOWrittenGenomicRun, Python ttio.written_genomic_run.WrittenGenomicRun.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    WrittenGenomicRun(Enums.AcquisitionMode acquisitionMode, String referenceUri, String platform, String sampleName, long[] positions, byte[] mappingQualities, int[] flags, byte[] sequences, byte[] qualities, long[] offsets, int[] lengths, List<String> cigars, List<String> readNames, List<String> mateChromosomes, long[] matePositions, int[] templateLengths, List<String> chromosomes, Enums.Compression signalCompression)
    Backwards-compatible constructor (pre-M86) that defaults signalCodecOverrides to empty.
    WrittenGenomicRun(Enums.AcquisitionMode acquisitionMode, String referenceUri, String platform, String sampleName, long[] positions, byte[] mappingQualities, int[] flags, byte[] sequences, byte[] qualities, long[] offsets, int[] lengths, List<String> cigars, List<String> readNames, List<String> mateChromosomes, long[] matePositions, int[] templateLengths, List<String> chromosomes, Enums.Compression signalCompression, Map<String,Enums.Compression> signalCodecOverrides)
    Backwards-compatible constructor (M86 era, 19 components) that defaults provenanceRecords to empty.
    WrittenGenomicRun(Enums.AcquisitionMode acquisitionMode, String referenceUri, String platform, String sampleName, long[] positions, byte[] mappingQualities, int[] flags, byte[] sequences, byte[] qualities, long[] offsets, int[] lengths, List<String> cigars, List<String> readNames, List<String> mateChromosomes, long[] matePositions, int[] templateLengths, List<String> chromosomes, Enums.Compression signalCompression, Map<String,Enums.Compression> signalCodecOverrides, List<ProvenanceRecord> provenanceRecords)
    Backwards-compatible constructor (Phase 1 / post-M91, 20 components) that defaults the M93 reference-related fields to their natural "no reference embedded" values.
    WrittenGenomicRun(Enums.AcquisitionMode acquisitionMode, String referenceUri, String platform, String sampleName, long[] positions, byte[] mappingQualities, int[] flags, byte[] sequences, byte[] qualities, long[] offsets, int[] lengths, List<String> cigars, List<String> readNames, List<String> mateChromosomes, long[] matePositions, int[] templateLengths, List<String> chromosomes, Enums.Compression signalCompression, Map<String,Enums.Compression> signalCodecOverrides, List<ProvenanceRecord> provenanceRecords, boolean embedReference, Map<String,byte[]> referenceChromSeqs, Path externalReferencePath)
    Creates an instance of a WrittenGenomicRun record class.

    • WrittenGenomicRun

      public WrittenGenomicRun(Enums.AcquisitionMode acquisitionMode, String referenceUri, String platform, String sampleName, long[] positions, byte[] mappingQualities, int[] flags, byte[] sequences, byte[] qualities, long[] offsets, int[] lengths, List<String> cigars, List<String> readNames, List<String> mateChromosomes, long[] matePositions, int[] templateLengths, List<String> chromosomes, Enums.Compression signalCompression, Map<String,Enums.Compression> signalCodecOverrides, List<ProvenanceRecord> provenanceRecords, boolean embedReference, Map<String,byte[]> referenceChromSeqs, Path externalReferencePath)
      Creates an instance of a WrittenGenomicRun record class.
      Parameters:
      acquisitionMode - the value for the acquisitionMode record component
      referenceUri - the value for the referenceUri record component
      platform - the value for the platform record component
      sampleName - the value for the sampleName record component
      positions - the value for the positions record component
      mappingQualities - the value for the mappingQualities record component
      flags - the value for the flags record component
      sequences - the value for the sequences record component
      qualities - the value for the qualities record component
      offsets - the value for the offsets record component
      lengths - the value for the lengths record component
      cigars - the value for the cigars record component
      readNames - the value for the readNames record component
      mateChromosomes - the value for the mateChromosomes record component
      matePositions - the value for the matePositions record component
      templateLengths - the value for the templateLengths record component
      chromosomes - the value for the chromosomes record component
      signalCompression - the value for the signalCompression record component
      signalCodecOverrides - the value for the signalCodecOverrides record component
      provenanceRecords - the value for the provenanceRecords record component
      embedReference - the value for the embedReference record component
      referenceChromSeqs - the value for the referenceChromSeqs record component
      externalReferencePath - the value for the externalReferencePath record component

    • WrittenGenomicRun

      public WrittenGenomicRun(Enums.AcquisitionMode acquisitionMode, String referenceUri, String platform, String sampleName, long[] positions, byte[] mappingQualities, int[] flags, byte[] sequences, byte[] qualities, long[] offsets, int[] lengths, List<String> cigars, List<String> readNames, List<String> mateChromosomes, long[] matePositions, int[] templateLengths, List<String> chromosomes, Enums.Compression signalCompression)
      Backwards-compatible constructor (pre-M86) that defaults signalCodecOverrides to empty. Existing callers that build a run without per-channel codec overrides continue to work unchanged.

    • WrittenGenomicRun

      public WrittenGenomicRun(Enums.AcquisitionMode acquisitionMode, String referenceUri, String platform, String sampleName, long[] positions, byte[] mappingQualities, int[] flags, byte[] sequences, byte[] qualities, long[] offsets, int[] lengths, List<String> cigars, List<String> readNames, List<String> mateChromosomes, long[] matePositions, int[] templateLengths, List<String> chromosomes, Enums.Compression signalCompression, Map<String,Enums.Compression> signalCodecOverrides)
      Backwards-compatible constructor (M86 era, 19 components) that defaults provenanceRecords to empty. Existing callers built before Phase 1 (post-M91) continue to work unchanged.

    • WrittenGenomicRun

      public WrittenGenomicRun(Enums.AcquisitionMode acquisitionMode, String referenceUri, String platform, String sampleName, long[] positions, byte[] mappingQualities, int[] flags, byte[] sequences, byte[] qualities, long[] offsets, int[] lengths, List<String> cigars, List<String> readNames, List<String> mateChromosomes, long[] matePositions, int[] templateLengths, List<String> chromosomes, Enums.Compression signalCompression, Map<String,Enums.Compression> signalCodecOverrides, List<ProvenanceRecord> provenanceRecords)
      Backwards-compatible constructor (Phase 1 / post-M91, 20 components) that defaults the M93 reference-related fields to their natural "no reference embedded" values. Existing callers that don't yet carry a reference continue to work unchanged.

  • Method Details

    • withReference

      public WrittenGenomicRun withReference(boolean embed, Map<String,byte[]> chromSeqs, Path externalPath)
      M93 (v1.5) full-fat builder. Returns a new instance with the same payload but with the M93 reference fields replaced. Builder-style convenience for callers that already have a base run and want to attach a reference for REF_DIFF dispatch.

    • readCount

      public int readCount()
      Number of reads (derived from offsets length).

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with '=='.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
